scene_input.scene_summary: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs shakes the Prophet's hand, beaming with pride.
scene_input.key_visual_action: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs shakes the Prophet's hand with a big smile

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 185
schema_output.moral_lesson: Being proud of one's achievements and the accomplishments of others

characters.name: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs
characters.appearance: slender build, youthful face, wearing a white thobe and simple brown woolen cloak, a bright smile on his face

characters.name: the central figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

schema_output.narrative_text: ʿ Abdullāh ibn Anīs was so proud to be chosen by the Prophet as one of his companions.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A majestic interior of the central figure's Mosque in Medina, with high wooden columns and a high ceiling adorned with intricate geometric patterns and calligraphy. Late afternoon golden sunlight pours through the large arched windows on the left, casting warm rays across the room. In the center of the room, two figures stand facing each other, hands clasped in a warm handshake. On the left, the man in the green cloak seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. On the right, a slender older man with a bright smile on his face, wearing a white thobe and simple brown woolen cloak, one hand extended in a firm handshake. Soft warm golden light, joyful and uplifting mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm beige, cream, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
